features.name: finish in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include $finish system task called within an always block sensitive to posedge clock

features.name: dpi function call in while loop condition with clocking
features.description: Code should include a DPI function call inside a while loop condition with @(posedge clk) event control

features.name: finish with dpi in clocked context
features.description: Code should include $finish called from always block with dpi function call in while condition using clocking
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin while (dpi_func()) @(posedge clk); $finish; end
